programs.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programs.desc: As the mackerel season begins in Newfoundland; the fishermen want a piece of the action; Skipper Donald Spence has just bought a new boat.

programs.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programs.sub_title: One Man's Guts, Another Man's Gold
programs.desc: Skipper Lee Pon and the Jacob Louisa hunt for herring; on their final trip of the season, the Crewshell Chill hunts for cod for the first time in more than 20 years.

programs.title: Cold Water Cowboys
programs.desc: Success eludes Lee Pond and the Jacob Louisa, as they struggle to find herring against humpbacks and a supermoon; the Sebastian Sails is plagued by equipment failures and a sonar blackout.

programs.title: Inside Taronga Zoo
programs.desc: A tiny marsupial in the form of a carnivorous chuditch starts to be problematic at feeding time; seven Asian elephants and their enclosure receive a thorough cleaning and they certainly make their presence known.

programs.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programs.desc: A warden follows the trail to locate a mysterious group of hunters; when a warden draws a coveted mule deer hunting tag, he makes memories to last a lifetime; wardens have to ask some tough questions when a large pile of wasted game birds is found.

programs.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programs.desc: The fishing season could end at any moment and tensions are at an all-time high.
